item.title: 如何让招聘流程“更人性化” | How to make the Recruitment process "more humane"
item.description:
招聘过程可以改变候选人甚至公司的生活。 毕竟，一个好的团队决定了任何一家公司的命运，每个员工都为此做出了贡献。 不幸的是，很多时候招聘人员和决策者最终将选拔过程变成了可怕的考验。 我并不是说每个人都是故意这样做的，但是，科技行业的很大一部分似乎都是这种情况。 这篇文章只是我试图反弹一些我认为需要被招聘行业听到的想法，以帮助更多符合条件的人找到好工作。

一个人如何以及在何处学习他们的技能不是一个因素

您的团队需要一个可以完成任务的人，如果候选人有能力这样做，那么他们就足够熟练了。 拥有正规教育（或大学学位）并不需要被认为比自学成才的候选人更好或更差。

自学成才的人往往会表现出神奇的决心、自我激励、克服逆境和掌握概念的能力。 但是，让我明确一点，我并不是说正规教育更容易或表现出更少的素质。

我的观点是，这不应该是一个与另一个的问题。 它应该只是对候选人能力的公正评价。

将候选人视为“人”

尽快通知他们拒绝和接受。 不要让不确定性迫在眉睫或给予虚假的希望。 快速拒绝通常比没有回应更痛苦。 您可能造成的影响可能是无法估量的。 这不仅仅是一份工作，更是“生活”的问题。 候选人需要为自己和亲人的生活提前计划。

孩子们可能需要新的 apt 学校。 配偶可能需要管理他们的时间安排。 有家庭成员需要医疗帮助的人需要做出安排。 住宿、旅游、设施等需要管理。 生活的许多方面不必要地停顿或漂浮在不确定中。

你越早给候选人你的决定，他们就能越早变得更加清晰，并开始他们的下一步生活。

更好的拒绝

除了让他们快速，如果将导致拒绝的具体标准传达给候选人也是有用的。 这可以帮助他们在这些方面提高自己，从而增加他们在下一次面试中成功的机会。

这似乎是一件苦差事，但如果您决定拒绝候选人，您已经充分意识到角色和候选人之间存在的缺点或错位。 花几分钟时间来传达这些信息对候选人来说是非常有益的，并且还可以让你的公司享有不将员工视为机械且易于更换的替身的声誉。

了解角色的实际要求

广撒网以邀请所有可能的技术/技能的人是浪费您的时间和他们的努力。 此外，它只会增加公司的成本，同时大大增加您的团队需要筛选的不相关应用程序的数量。

仔细制定一组与特定角色实际相关的要求将对所有相关人员都有帮助。 不必要地在空缺广告中包含所有可能的条款不仅会使一些优秀的候选人望而却步，而且还可能导致您雇用可能不是最合适的人。

包括有关所使用的相关技术的信息、该角色的职责以及预期的软技能，可以帮助吸引那些为工作做好准备的人。 这也将使应届生和自学成才的候选人更好地评估自己，并知道他们有机会申请。

逼真的技能匹配

大多数角色不需要 100% 了解技术或语言的各个方面。 你真正需要的是具备足够的基础知识、愿意学习、有解决问题的能力以及对他人有正确态度的候选人。 然后你就有了一个可靠且面向未来的团队成员。

让条款明确说明哪些概念对于日常履行该职位是强制性的，然后提及其他有助于在该职位上表现出色的要求，可以帮助您的公司和潜在申请人更好地了解该职位。

将候选人与处理大部分角色所需的实际概念相匹配可能就足够了。 其余的可以由优秀的候选人在工作中学习。

拒绝候选人而不考虑他们有提升技能的潜力对任何一方都没有帮助。

薪酬正义

工作是一种收入手段……是实现财务自由的一种方式。 无可否认。 因此，无论一个角色有多充实或有用，员工都需要一份与所需努力和所需技能相匹配的薪酬。 此外，它需要是一种不基于性别、种族、国籍等，而是基于技能的薪酬。 员工不仅在处理您的任务，而且还为工作贡献了他们“生活”的每一天。 他们应该得到相应的补偿。 所有候选人，都是值得同等尊重的人

一个勤劳的人因为人们的偏见或偏见而被剥夺了体面的生活，是全人类的污点。

经验大于经验

对于大多数工作来说，需要的是解决可能出现的问题的能力，或者使用一些基本技术/技能创造新事物的能力。 一个尝试过 100 个项目或在多个项目上花费大量时间和精力的新手可能拥有足够（甚至更多）的技能，作为一个工作多年的人。 这对于实际的人和工作来说自然是主观的，但是仅仅拥有多年的经验不应该是考虑的主要因素。

有时候选人可能精通处理实际工作，但可能不知道他们正在做什么的相关“技术术语”。 除非工作绝对有必要（例如，在担任教学角色的情况下），*不知道确切的术语不一定是衡量候选人技能的标准。 结论

这一切都不是指责或使其成为美国对他们。 目的是表明我们实际上都是同一个生态系统的一部分。 今天的招聘人员可能需要成为明天的候选人。 今天的候选人可能拥有一家公司或明天成为决策者。 因此，采取正确的步骤有助于强化人们付出足够努力就能找到工作，而无需依赖运气或招聘人员的心情。

一个强大的“过程”到位当然是必要的，但是，不能忘记人的因素。 心态的轻微改变，以及评估人们做出的小决定的后果的意愿，可能会对每个人产生巨大而直接的影响。

此外，让每个人都更人性化的事情有助于整个行业（更不用说，无论如何这是正确的做法）。 我们需要提醒自己，我们属于同一个“社会动物”群体（人类），需要相互支持才能生存和发展。 我们不应该屈服于成为彼此恐惧或享受他人痛苦的掠食者和猎物。

这显然不是一些研究驱动的文章，可能与它完全相反。 所以，我相信我上面提到的观点会有很多分歧。 随时在评论中添加它们，以便我们互相学习。 关键是要对这一切进行健康的讨论，这样我们就可以让彼此意识到并朝着正确的方向前进……一起。



原文:

The recruitment process can be life-altering for the candidate, and even for the company. A good team is after all what decides the fate of any company, and every employee contributes towards it. Unfortunately, many times the recruiters and the decision-makers end up turning the selection process into a dreaded ordeal. I'm not saying that everyone does so on purpose, but, it seems to be the case in a huge chunk of the tech industry. This post is just my attempt at bouncing off some ideas that i think need to be heard by the recruitment industry, to help more eligible people to get good jobs.

How & Where a person learned their skills is not a factor

Your team needs a person that can complete the task, if the candidate is capable of doing so, then they are skilled enough. Having a formal education (or college degree) doesn't need to be considered better or worse than a self-taught candidate.

A self-taught person would have often shown miraculous determination, ability to self-motivate, overcome adversities and grasp concepts by themselves. But, let me be clear, i'm not saying that a formal education is any easier or displays any less calibre.

My point is that it shouldn't be a matter of one vs. the other. It should just be an unbiased evaluation of the candidate's abilities.

Consider candidates as 'people'

Inform them about rejections & acceptance as soon as possible. Don't let uncertainty loom or give false hope. A quick rejection is often less painful than no response. The impact you may be causing could be immeasurable. It is not just a job, it is a matter of 'life'. The candidate needs to plan ahead for their own life, and for that of their loved ones.

Kids may need new apt schools. Spouses may need to manage their time schedules. People having family members that need medical-assistance would need to make arrangements. Accomodation,travel,facilities ,etc. need to be managed. So many facets of life unnecessarily paused or floating in uncertainty.

The sooner you give the candidate your decision, the sooner they can have more clarity and resume their next steps in life.

Better Rejections

Along with making them quick, it would also be useful if the specific criteria that caused the rejection are conveyed to the candidate. This can help them improve themselves in those areas, hence increasing their chances of succeeding in their next interview.

It may seem like a chore, but if you've decided to reject the candidate, you are already fully aware of the shortcomings or the mis-alignment that is present between the role and the candidate. Spending a few minutes to convey this information can be immensely beneficial to the candidate, and can also give your company a reputation for being someone that doesn't view employees as a mechanical and easily replaceable stand-in.

Understand the actual requirements for the role

Casting a broad net to invite people from all possible tech/skills is a waste of your time & their efforts. Also, it just adds more cost to the company, along with drastically increasing the amount of irrelevant applications that your team will need to sift through.

Carefully crafting a set of requirements that are actually relevant to the specific role would be helpful for all involved. Unnecessarily including all possible terms into the vacancy ad will not just keep away some good candidates, but it could also lead you to hiring someone that may not be the best fit.

Including information about the relevant tech used, responsibilities that will come under the role and the soft-skills that are expected, can help to attract people who are more prepared for the job. This would also make freshers and self-taught candidates to evaluate themselves better and know that they have a chance to apply.

Realistic skill matching

Most roles don't need 100% knowledge of every aspect of a tech or language. What you actually need to find are candidates with enough fundamental knowledge, willingness to learn, ability to solve problems & have the right attitude towards others. Then you have a reliable & future-proof team-member.

Making the terms clear about what concepts will be mandatory for the daily fulfillment of the role, and then mentioning other requirements which could help to excel in the role, could help to give your company and potential applicants, a better understanding of the role.

Matching the candidate with the actual concepts that are needed to handle a majority of the role is probably enough. The rest can be learned on the job by a good candidate.

Denying candidates without considering that they have the potential to upgrade their skills is not helpful for either party.

Justice In Pay

A job is a means for an income...a way towards financial freedom. There is no denying it. So regardless of how fulfilling or useful a role is, an employee needs a pay that is justified for the effort required and the skills needed. Also, it needs to be a pay not discriminated based on gender, race, nationality, etc but on skill. The employee is not just handling your tasks, but is also contributing a daily chunk of their 'life' towards the job. They deserve to be compensated accordingly. All candidates, are human-beings that deserve equal respect

A hard-working individual being denied a decent life due to the biases or prejudices of people , is a stain on all of humanity.

Experiences over experience

For most jobs, what is required is the ability to solve problems that may arise, or create new things with the use of some basic technology/skills. A newbie that has tried doing a 100 projects or spent a lot of time & efforts on multiple projects could have enough(maybe even more) skills as a person experienced for years at a job. It is naturally subjective to the actual person and the job, but having years of experience alone shouldn't be a prime factor that is considered.

Sometimes a candidate may be proficient in handling the actual work , but may not know the relevant 'technical term' for what they are doing. Unless it is absolutely necessary for the job ,(maybe for example in case of a teaching role) , *not knowing the exact terminology doesn't have to be a measure of the candidate's skills. *

CONCLUSION

None of this is to point fingers or make it an US vs. THEM. The aim is to suggest that we are all actually part of the same ecosystem. A recruiter today may need to be a candidate tomorrow. A candidate today may own a company or be the decision-maker tomorrow. So, taking the right steps can help to reinforce that people putting enough effort can get a job without needing to rely on luck or the mood of the recruiter.

A robust 'process' being in place is certainly a necessity, but, the human element cannot be forgotten. A slight change in mindset, and willingness to evaluate the ramifications of the small decisions that are taken by people, could probably have a large and immediate impact for everyone.

Also, making things more humane for everyone helps the industry as a whole (not to mention, it is the right thing to do anyway). We need to remind ourselves that we belong to the same 'social animal' group (humans) that need to support each other to survive, and thrive. We should not stoop down to being predators and preys that fear each other or relish in the suffering of another.

This was obviously not some research-driven article, and is probably the exact opposite of it. So, I'm sure there'll be many disagreements to the points I've mentioned above. Feel free to add them in the comments so that we can learn from each other. The whole point is to have a healthy discussion about all this so that we can make each other aware and move forward towards whatever is right..together.
item.author: notanothervivek

结尾

瓦利德·尼哈尔·艾哈迈德 - 一旦暂停，ztologame 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，ztologame 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，ztologame 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 ztologame 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 ztologame：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 ztologame 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

ZtoloGame

Posted on Aug 7

To turn it off:

old_logger = ActiveRecord::Base.logger ActiveRecord::Base.logger = nil

To turn it back on:

ActiveRecord::Base.logger = old_logger
Solution 2:

Here's a variation I consider somewhat cleaner, that still allows potential other logging from AR. In config/environments/development.rb :

config.after_initialize do ActiveRecord::Base.logger = Rails.logger.clone ActiveRecord::Base.logger.level = Logger::INFO end

Solution 3:

This might not be a suitable solution for the console, but Rails has a method for this problem: Logger#silence

ActiveRecord::Base.logger.silence do # the stuff you want to be silenced

end

𝕁𝕦𝕝𝕚𝕒 👩🏻‍💻 - Aug 7

Waleedh Nihal Ahmed - Aug 7

Once suspended, ztologame will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, ztologame will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by ztologame will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If ztologame is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag ztologame:

ztologame consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging ztologame will restore default visibility to their posts.

item.title: M1 macのc++でGLFWを使ってみる | M1 macのc++でGLFWを使ってみる
item.description:
环境

> uname -m arm64 > brew config macOS: 12.5-arm64 Rosetta 2: false

GLFWをインストール

> brew install glfw > brew --prefix glfw /opt/homebrew/opt/glfw

コンパイル・実行してみるコード

インストールしただけだとエラーになる

❯ g++ -o main main.cpp -lglfw -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo main.cpp:1:10: fatal error: 'GLFW/glfw3.h' file not found #include <GLFW/glfw3.h>

CPATH, LIBRARY_PATHを环境変数に追加

> vim ~/.zshrc # 下記を追加export CPATH = /opt/homebrew/include export LIBRARY_PATH = /opt/homebrew/lib

コンパイル・実行成功

  • コンパイル成功したけど、警告が沢山出る。これはAppleがOpenGLを基本廃止（推非奨）にしているかららしい。
 ❯ g++ -o main main.cpp -lglfw -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo main.cpp:23:5: warning: 'glClear' is deprecated: first deprecated in macOS 10.14 - OpenGL API deprecated. ( Define GL_SILENCE_DEPRECATION to silence these warnings ) [ -Wdeprecated-declarations ] glClear ( GL_COLOR_BUFFER_BIT ) ; ^ /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks/OpenGL.framework/Headers/gl.h:2394:13: note: 'glClear' has been explicitly marked deprecated here extern void glClear ( GLbitfield mask ) OPENGL_DEPRECATED ( 10.0, 10.14 ) ;

警告を非表示にしてみる

  • コードに下记をする。
    • Makefileを作る
      CPPFLAGS := -I src/includes FRAMEWORKS := -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo LIBS := -lglfw BUILD_DIR := ./bin SRC_DIRS := ./src SRCS := $( shell find $(SRC_DIRS) -name * .cpp ) OBJS := $( addprefix $(BUILD_DIR) /, $( subst .cpp,.o, $( notdir $(SRCS) ))) $(BUILD_DIR)/main : $(OBJS) clang++ -o $@ $(LIBS) $(FRAMEWORKS) $^ $(BUILD_DIR)/%.o : src/%.cpp clang++ -c -o $@ $(CPPFLAGS) $< do : @ bin/main clean : rm -rf bin mkdir bin

      调试できない

      • vimspectorで、 .vimspector.jsonを下記のように設定してみたけど、エラーになる。 vimspectorで、 .vimspector.jsonを下记のように设定してみたけど、エラーになる。
      • -lglfwがあるとエラーになるっぽい。 -lglfwがあるとエラーになるっぽい。
       { "configurations" : { "CodeLLDB" : { "adapter" : "CodeLLDB" , "variables" : { "BUILDME" : { "shell" : "clang++ -o ${workspaceRoot}/bin/debug -g -lglfw -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo ${workspaceRoot}/src/main.cpp" } }, "configuration" : { "request" : "launch" , "program" : "${workspaceRoot}/bin/debug" , "stdio" : [ null , null , null ] } } }
}

      青いウインドウを表示するコード

      #ifdef __APPLE__ #define GL_SILENCE_DEPRECATION #include <GLFW/glfw3.h> #endif #include <iostream>
using namespace std ; static void key_callback ( GLFWwindow * window , int key , int scancode , int action , int mods ) { if ( key == GLFW_KEY_ESCAPE && action == GLFW_PRESS ) glfwSetWindowShouldClose ( window , GLFW_TRUE ); } int main ( void ) { GLFWwindow * window ; if ( ! glfwInit ()) return - 1 ; glfwWindowHint ( GLFW_CONTEXT_VERSION_MAJOR , 3 ); glfwWindowHint ( GLFW_CONTEXT_VERSION_MINOR , 2 ); glfwWindowHint ( GLFW_OPENGL_FORWARD_COMPAT , GL_TRUE ); glfwWindowHint ( GLFW_OPENGL_PROFILE , GLFW_OPENGL_CORE_PROFILE ); window = glfwCreateWindow ( 640 , 480 , "Hello World" , NULL , NULL ); if ( ! window ) { cout << "failed to create window." << endl ; glfwTerminate (); return - 1 ; } cout << "opened window" << endl ; glfwSetKeyCallback ( window , key_callback ); glfwMakeContextCurrent ( window ); glfwSwapInterval ( 1 ); const GLubyte * renderer = glGetString ( GL_RENDERER ); const GLubyte * version = glGetString ( GL_VERSION ); std :: cout << "Renderer: " << renderer << std :: endl ; std :: cout << "OpenGL version supported: " << version << std :: endl ; glClearColor ( 0.0 f , 0.3 f , 0.6 f , 0.3 f ); while ( ! glfwWindowShouldClose ( window )) { glClear ( GL_COLOR_BUFFER_BIT ); glfwSwapBuffers ( window ); glfwPollEvents (); } glfwTerminate (); cout << "closed window" << endl ; }

      リポジトリ

      表示されるウインドウ

卡琼坎贝尔 - 艾琳谢弗 - 一旦暂停，web3ten0 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，web3ten0 将能够再次评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，web3ten0 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 web3ten0 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 web3ten0 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 web3ten0 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

OpenGLについてまだ全然分かっていませんが、GLFWを使ってアニメーションを表示したいと思っています。とりあえず、M1 macのc++でウインドウを表示しました。

環境 

> uname -m
arm64
> brew config
macOS: 12.5-arm64
Rosetta 2: false

GLFWをインストール 

> brew install glfw
> brew --prefix glfw
/opt/homebrew/opt/glfw

コンパイル・実行してみるコード

インストールしただけだとエラーになる 

❯ g++ -o main main.cpp -lglfw -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo
main.cpp:1:10: fatal error: 'GLFW/glfw3.h' file not found
#include <GLFW/glfw3.h>

CPATH, LIBRARY_PATHを環境変数に追加 

> vim ~/.zshrc
# 下記を追加
export CPATH=/opt/homebrew/include
export LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/homebrew/lib

コンパイル・実行成功

  • コンパイル成功したけど、warningが沢山出る。これはAppleがOpenGLを基本廃止（非推奨）にしているかららしい。 
❯ g++ -o main main.cpp -lglfw -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo
main.cpp:23:5: warning: 'glClear' is deprecated: first deprecated in macOS 10.14 - OpenGL API deprecated. (Define GL_SILENCE_DEPRECATION to silence these warnings) [-Wdeprecated-declarations] glClear(GL_COLOR_BUFFER_BIT); ^
/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks/OpenGL.framework/Headers/gl.h:2394:13: note: 'glClear' has been explicitly marked deprecated here
extern void glClear (GLbitfield mask) OPENGL_DEPRECATED(10.0, 10.14);

warningを非表示にしてみる

  • コードに下記を追加する。
    • #define GL_SILENCE_DEPRECATION によって、非表示になる。 
#ifdef __APPLE__
#define GL_SILENCE_DEPRECATION
#include <GLFW/glfw3.h>
#endif

Makefileを作る 

CPPFLAGS := -I src/includes
FRAMEWORKS := -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo
LIBS := -lglfw BUILD_DIR := ./bin
SRC_DIRS := ./src
SRCS := $(shell find $(SRC_DIRS) -name *.cpp)
OBJS := $(addprefix $(BUILD_DIR)/, $(subst .cpp,.o, $(notdir $(SRCS)))) $(BUILD_DIR)/main: $(OBJS) clang++ -o $@ $(LIBS) $(FRAMEWORKS) $^ $(BUILD_DIR)/%.o: src/%.cpp clang++ -c -o $@ $(CPPFLAGS) $< do: @bin/main
clean: rm -rf bin mkdir bin

Debugできない

  • vimspectorで、.vimspector.jsonを下記のように設定してみたけど、エラーになる。
  • -lglfwがあるとエラーになるっぽい。 
{ "configurations": { "CodeLLDB": { "adapter": "CodeLLDB", "variables": { "BUILDME": { "shell": "clang++ -o ${workspaceRoot}/bin/debug -g -lglfw -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo ${workspaceRoot}/src/main.cpp" } }, "configuration": { "request": "launch", "program": "${workspaceRoot}/bin/debug", "stdio": [null, null, null] } } }
}

青いウインドウを表示するコード 

#ifdef __APPLE__
#define GL_SILENCE_DEPRECATION
#include <GLFW/glfw3.h>
#endif

#include <iostream>
using namespace std; static void key_callback(GLFWwindow* window, int key, int scancode, int action, int mods) { if (key == GLFW_KEY_ESCAPE && action == GLFW_PRESS) glfwSetWindowShouldClose(window, GLFW_TRUE);
} int main(void) { GLFWwindow* window; if (!glfwInit()) return -1; glfwWindowHint(GLFW_CONTEXT_VERSION_MAJOR, 3); glfwWindowHint(GLFW_CONTEXT_VERSION_MINOR, 2); glfwWindowHint(GLFW_OPENGL_FORWARD_COMPAT, GL_TRUE); glfwWindowHint(GLFW_OPENGL_PROFILE, GLFW_OPENGL_CORE_PROFILE); window = glfwCreateWindow(640, 480, "Hello World", NULL, NULL); if (!window) { cout << "failed to create window." << endl; glfwTerminate(); return -1; } cout << "opened window" << endl; glfwSetKeyCallback(window, key_callback); glfwMakeContextCurrent(window); glfwSwapInterval(1); const GLubyte* renderer = glGetString(GL_RENDERER); const GLubyte* version = glGetString(GL_VERSION); std::cout << "Renderer: " << renderer << std::endl; std::cout << "OpenGL version supported: " << version << std::endl; glClearColor(0.0f, 0.3f, 0.6f, 0.3f); while (!glfwWindowShouldClose(window)) { glClear(GL_COLOR_BUFFER_BIT); glfwSwapBuffers(window); glfwPollEvents(); } glfwTerminate(); cout << "closed window" << endl;
}

リポジトリ

https://github.com/web3ten0/cpp-glfw-1

表示されるウインドウ

Cajaun Campbell - Dec 12 '21

Erin Schaffer - Dec 10 '21

If web3ten0 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

item.title: 带有 Nginx 入口的 KeyCloak | KeyCloak with Nginx Ingress
item.description:
你好，如果你来到这里，我想你也厌倦了在 Kubernetes (K8s) 中找到使用 Ingress(Nginx) 部署 KeyCloak 的解决方案，我遇到了一些不太公开的问题，所以我在这里确保你没有经历过我经历过的痛苦😅所以让我们开始吧。

赠品

第一步

选择您要使用的图表，有 2 个掌舵图表

比特纳米钥匙披风
以代码为中心的 KeyCloak

随意使用其中的任何一个，您可以使用谷歌搜索或单击上面提供的链接。 对于此示例，我们将使用 Bitnami KeyCloak，我个人认为使用此图表更容易部署。

第二步

所以我猜你也决定使用 Bitnami 图表，所以你需要注意的事情很少，否则部署将失败。

注意

确保您已通过传入 values.yaml 为外部数据库设置密码

externalDatabase.password

postgresql.auth.password

这 2 个字段应该具有相同的值，否则您将遇到 postgres 错误并且 pod 将进入crashback-loop
由于我们使用 Nginx 作为 Ingress-Controller 我们将启用入口

ingress.enabled

ingress.hostname

ingress.pathType

我希望您在 values.yaml 中找到这些值并覆盖它们，这是最重要的事情，因为我们在我们的案例中使用了 Application Load Balancer（我将很快附上如何做到这一点的链接。）
我已经以这样的方式配置它，在 ALB 之前，所有流量都在HTTPS中，如果您有相同的情况，则从那里在HTTP中
确保您已完成此更改。

proxy: edge

您还可以配置用户名及其密码，希望您能找到这些值。

现在您可以使用更新的值部署掌舵图并等待几秒钟，因为您需要一些时间为自己拿一个水瓶🍾。

第三步

确认它正在成功运行尝试使用 kube-proxy 命令将端口代理到您的本地系统并查看它是否正在运行，如果是，那么我们可以继续前进，如果不是🥺 请检查您所做的配置或随时询问在评论中。

第四步

如果您在设置入口时已完成此步骤，那很好，但如果没有，您就像我一样😊。

我们需要配置我们的 Nginx 入口控制器来传递标头，所以在挖掘了 5 天后我发现了这个，
我们需要创建一个包含以下数据的 configmap

kind: ConfigMap apiVersion: v1 metadata: name: <chart-name-with-which-deployed>-nginx-ingress-controller namespace: <namespace-in-which-deployed-nginx-ingress-controller> data: use-forwarded-headers: "true" forwarded-for-header: "X-Forwarded-For"

并确保名称正确，否则将无法正常工作，要验证它是否正常工作，请查看 pod 的日志

nginx-controller-nginx-ingress-controller

你会看到类似的东西

Found the configmap needed to reload backend, reload complete

不完全是这样，你就完成了

现在转到与 keycloak 关联的主机名，您将能够毫无问题地访问管理面板。

如果这些步骤未完成，让我们讨论错误

首先，如果您在升级 helm chart 时没有设置密码，您将失去与 postgres 的连接，因为默认密码是随机生成的，它将在升级后更改，因此请确保您提供了密码。

其次，如果标题没有通过 Ingress 你将无法访问管理控制台，而不是你会被困在

/admin/master/console

如果它已经配置，您将不会遇到此错误。

第三个太多重定向

这是由于proxy=passthrough导致了这个错误。
及其默认值，因此请确保您的 tls 是否在 keycloak 前面的负载均衡器或代理处终止，那么您必须使用

proxy: edge

它会开始工作

和

我的朋友，如果您做对了所有这些，您将能够看到管理控制台的登录屏幕

随时问任何问题



原文:

Hello there, If you came here I guess you are also tired of finding the solution to Deploy KeyCloak with Ingress(Nginx) in Kubernetes (K8s), I have faced the some issue that are not available very openly, so I'm here to make sure you didn't go through the pain I have gone through 😅 so let's start.

Perquisite

Kubernetes Cluster(can create with KOps), Ingress Controller (Nginx)

Step I

Select Which chart you want to use, there are 2 helm chart

Bitnami KeyCloak
Codecentric KeyCloak

Feel Free to Use anyone of these you can just google them or click on the link provided above. For this Example we'll use the Bitnami KeyCloak, personally I think it's easier to deploy with this chart.

Step II

So I guess you decided to use the Bitnami Chart too, so there are few thing you need to take care otherwise the deployment will fail.

NOTICE

Make sure you have set the password for the external database by passing into values.yaml

externalDatabase.password

postgresql.auth.password

These 2 field should have same value otherwise you'll run into postgres error and pod will go crashback-loop
And Since we are using Nginx as Ingress-Controller we are going to to enable the ingress

ingress.enabled

ingress.hostname

ingress.pathType

I hope you are finding these value in values.yaml and overwriting them, now most Important thing since we are using Application Load Balancer in our case (I'll attach the link how to do that too soon.)
I have configure it in such a way that Before ALB all traffic is in HTTPS and from there in HTTP if you have the same case
make sure you have done this change.

proxy: edge

And You can configure the username and its password as well I hope you'll find the values.

Now You can deploy the helm chart with updated values and the wait for few seconds as it will take some time grab a water bottle for yourself 🍾.

STEP III

Confirmation that it's running successfully try the kube-proxy command to proxy the port to you're local system and see if it's running if yes then we can move forward, if not 🥺 plz check the configuration that you have made or feel free to ask in comments.

STEP IV

If you have done this step while setting up the ingress it's well and good but if not you are like me😊.

KeyCloak needs some headers to work behind proxy as it's mentioned here

We need to configure our Nginx Ingress Controller to pass the headers so after digging for 5 Days I found this,
We need to create a configmap which contains the following data

kind: ConfigMap apiVersion: v1 metadata: name: <chart-name-with-which-deployed>-nginx-ingress-controller namespace: <namespace-in-which-deployed-nginx-ingress-controller> data: use-forwarded-headers: "true" forwarded-for-header: "X-Forwarded-For"

and make sure the name is correct otherwise it will not work, to verify it's working see the logs of the pod

nginx-controller-nginx-ingress-controller

You'll see something like

Found the configmap needed to reload backend, reload complete

not exactly but something like this and you're done

Now go to your hostname that associated with keycloak you'll be able to access the admin-panel without issue.

Let's Discuss the Error if These Steps are not Completed

First if you didn't set the password whenever you'll upgrade the helm chart you'll loose the connection with postgres as the by default password is randomly generated it will change after upgrade so make sure you have provided the password.

Second if the header are not making through Ingress You'll not be able to access the admin console rather than you'll be stuck with

/admin/master/console

if it's already configure you'll not face this error.

Third too many redirect

This is due the proxy=passthrough which lead to this error.
And its default value so make sure if your tls terminate at loadbalancer or proxy which is in front of keycloak then you have to use the

proxy: edge

and it will start working

And

My Friend if you have done all this right you will be able to see the login screen of admin console

Feel Free to ask any question
item.author: ashutosh5786

item.title: 云原生应用保护平台 | Cloud-Native Application Protection Platforms
item.description:
桑吉特·莫汉蒂

发表于随着越来越多的企业采用基于微服务的架构和基于 Kubernetes 的编排工具，作为其云原生运动的一部分，应用程序的安全性变得比以往任何时候都更加重要！

在这一集中，我将带您了解企业接受云原生应用程序安全这一不可或缺的要求的最明智的方式之一。

这一集就在下面。 希望你们都喜欢！

一旦暂停，三吉屯将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，三极屯将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发表，三极屯的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 sanjitun 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记三吉屯的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 sanjitun 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Sanjit Mohanty

Posted on Aug 7

With more & more enterprises adopting micro services based architecture and Kubernetes based orchestration toolings, as part of their cloud native movement, the application security has become far more critical than ever!

In this episode, I will be taking you through one of the most sensible way for enterprises to embrace this indispensable requirement of cloud native application security.

The episode is right below here. Hope you all like it!

If sanjitun is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

item.title: 奇迹早晨：成功的 6 个早晨习惯 | The Miracle Morning: 6 Morning Habits to be Successful
item.description:
照片由Sergei A在Unsplash上拍摄

我正在听 Hal Elrod 的播客。 他解释了6个可以改变一个人的杀手习惯。 一旦我在日常生活中应用了其中的一些规则，我确信它会完美运行。

储蓄者

为当天的目标设定心态。 当您保持沉默时，您也可以使用计时器。 不要阅读，不要听任何东西，只是坐着思考。 在放松和警觉之间找到平衡的姿势。 这十分钟将使您的一天变得更有效率和更有成效，而不仅仅是忙碌的一天！

对你愿意实现的事情持肯定态度。 想想你承诺要做的事情。 你可以致力于每天跑步，或者成为百万富翁，或者储蓄 50%，或者进入一家大公司。 提醒自己你所承诺的。 在肯定的同时，想想这四点；

  1. 你致力于什么？
  2. 为什么它对你有深刻的意义？
  3. 您致力于开展哪些活动以取得成功？
  4. 您具体何时致力于开展这些活动？

这将提高意识并使您成为真正的实干家。

想象自己以极大的动力做这些活动。 想象自己穿着鞋子出门。 并想象自己以极大的动力奔跑。 想象一下自己付出了所有的努力，最终得到了成就的回报。 所有伟大的运动员都想象自己正在努力工作并实现自己的目标。

早上锻炼，即使是六十秒。 即使你晚上去健身房，很短的运动时间也会让你精力充沛，让你开始新的一天。 有许多应用程序可让您在家锻炼。 一个例子是“七分钟锻炼”。

我们所有人都处于某种状态。 有的想要幸福，有的想要富有，有的想要成为更好的人。 每个主题都有数百本书。 如果您每天阅读五页，那么每月将累积到 150 页。 如果你坚持这个习惯，这最终会让你变成一个更好的自己。

这是一种提高意识和利用你的正能量的方法。 早上只需5分钟。 您可以在应用程序或纸上书写。

  1. 写下三件让你心存感激的新事物
  2. 实现最大目标需要做的三件事

每天把它们写下来，你会发现自己有很多快乐的理由。 你在生活中取得了很多成就，而你的下一个目标只是另一个目标。 当你意识到这一点时，你会更有信心。

对自己所处的位置和所做的事情感到满意。 只要知道你会在正确的时刻达到你的目标。 所以不要感到压力或悲伤。 享受你的一天，并知道你正在逐渐实现你的目标。



原文:

Photo by Sergei A on Unsplash

I was listening to a podcast by Hal Elrod. He explained 6 killer habits that would transform a person. Once I was applying a few of those rules in my daily life and I know for sure that, it works perfectly.

SAVERS

S - Silence (Meditation, Tefekkür). Set the mindset for the goals of the day. As you are being silent, you can use a timer too. Don't read, don't listen to anything, just sit and think. Find a balanced posture between relaxation and alertness. These ten minutes will transform your day to be more effective and more productive, not just another busy day!

A - Affirmation. Be affirmative about the things that you are willing to achieve. Think of the things that you are committed to doing. You could be committed to running every day or to becoming a millionaire or saving 50% or entering a big company. Remind yourself what you are committed to. While being affirmative, think about these four points;

  1. What are you committed to?
  2. Why is it deeply meaningful to you?
  3. What activities are you committed to doing that will lead to success?
  4. When specifically are you committed to doing those activities?

This will raise awareness and make you a real doer.

V - Visualize. Visualize yourself doing the activities with great motivation. Imagine yourself wearing shoes and going outside. And imagine yourself running with great motivation. Imagine yourself doing all the hard work and finally being rewarded with achievements. All the great athletes visualize themselves working hard and achieving their goals.

E - Exercise. Exercise in the morning even if it is for sixty seconds. Even if you go to the gym in the evening, a very short period of exercise will energize you and give you a great start to the day. There are many apps that let you exercise from home. One example would be "Seven minutes Exercise".

R - Read. All of us are in some conditions. Some want to be happy, some want to be wealthy, and some want to be a better person. And there are hundreds of books on each topic. If you read five pages a day, that will accumulate to 150 pages a month. If you persist in this habit, this will eventually transform you into a better version of yourself.

S - Scribing (Writing). It is a way to raise awareness and harness positive energy in you. It will take only 5 minutes in the morning. You can write on an app or on a paper.

  1. Write three new things that you are grateful for
  2. Three important things that you need to do to achieve your biggest goal

Write them every day, and you will discover that you have so many reasons to be happy. You have achieved so many things in your life, and your next goal is just yet another goal. You would be more confident as you realize that.

Be happy with where you are and what you are doing. Just know that you will reach your goal at the right moment. So don't get stressed or sad. Just enjoy your day and know that gradually you are reaching your goals.
item.author: sadiqur_rahman

item.title: 蓝牙控制机器人 | Bluetooth Controlled Robot
item.description:
罗希思 ND

发表于在这篇博客中，我将向您展示如何使用 HC-05 蓝牙模块和 Arduino 微控制器构建蓝牙控制机器人。 您可以使用 Playstore 中提供的任何蓝牙移动应用程序将您的手机连接到蓝牙模块。

所需组件

  • 齿轮马达
  • 集成电路 L293D

为此，请使用 Arduino 编程语言（基于布线）和基于处理的 Arduino 软件 (IDE)。

您可以使用此模块在两个微控制器（例如 Arduino）之间进行通信，或与任何支持蓝牙的设备（例如电话或笔记本电脑）进行通信。 许多 Android 应用程序已经可用，这使得这个过程变得更加容易。

齿轮马达

它是一种带有齿轮箱的直流电动机，用于降低速度并增加扭矩和功率。 这种类型的电机通常用于机器人应用。

集成电路 L293D

在那个蓝牙应用程序中，点击0会关闭电机，而按下1会导致电机 1 向右旋转。 与此类似，当敲击2和3时，电机4分别向左转、电机2向右转和电机2向左转。

代码

int motorPin1 = 3 ; int motorPin2 = 4 ; int motorPin3 = 5 ; int motorPin4 = 6 ; int state ; int flag ; void setup () { Serial . begin ( 9600 ); pinMode ( 3 , OUTPUT ); pinMode ( 4 , OUTPUT ); pinMode ( 5 , OUTPUT ); pinMode ( 6 , OUTPUT ); } void loop () { if ( Serial . available () > 0 ) { state = Serial . read (); flag = 0 ; } if ( state == '0' ) { digitalWrite ( 3 , LOW ); digitalWrite ( 4 , LOW ); digitalWrite ( 5 , LOW ); digitalWrite ( 6 , LOW ); if ( flag = 0 ) { Serial . println ( "MOTOR:off" ); flag = 1 ; } } else if ( state == '1' ) { digitalWrite ( 3 , LOW ); digitalWrite ( 4 , HIGH ); if ( flag == 0 ) { Serial . println ( "MOTOR1:right" ); flag = 1 ; } } else if ( state == '2' ) { digitalWrite ( 3 , HIGH ); digitalWrite ( 4 , LOW ); if ( flag == 0 ) { Serial . println ( "MOTOR1:left" ); flag = 1 ; } } else if ( state == '3' ) { digitalWrite ( 5 , LOW ); digitalWrite ( 6 , HIGH ); if ( flag == 0 ) { Serial . println ( "MOTOR2:right" ); flag = 1 ; } } else if ( state == '4' ) { digitalWrite ( 5 , HIGH ); digitalWrite ( 6 , LOW ); if ( flag == 0 ) { Serial . println ( "MOTOR2:LEFT" ); flag = 1 ; } } }

蒂卡姆辛格阿尔玛 - 一旦暂停，ndrohith 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，ndrohith 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，ndrohith 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 ndrohith 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 ndrohith：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 ndrohith 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Rohith ND

Posted on Aug 7

In this blog, I will show you how to build a bluetooth controlled robot with HC-05 bluetooth module and an Arduino microcontroller. You can use any bluetooth mobile app available in playstore to connect you mobile to bluetooth module.

Components required

  • Arduino UNO
  • HC-05
  • Gear Motors
  • IC L293D

Arduino UNO

Arduino is an opensource electronics platform based on easy-to-use hardware and software. Arduino boards are able to read inputs - light on a sensor , a finger on a button , or a twitter message - and turn it into an output - activating a motor , turning on a LED , publishing something online. To do so use the Arduino programming language (based on wiring) and the Arduino Software (IDE) based on processing.

HC-05 Bluetooth module

The HC-05 is a popular wireless module that can add two-way (full-duplex) functionality to your projects. You can use this module to communicate between two microcontrollers, such as Arduino, or to communicate with any Bluetooth-enabled device, such as a phone or laptop. Many Android applications are already available, making this process much easier.

Gear Motors

It is a DC motor with a gear box for decreasing the speed and increasing the torque and power . This type of motors is commonly used for robotic applications.

IC L293D

IC L293D is a dual H-bridge motor driver integrated circuit that can drive current of up to 600mA with voltage range of 4.5 to 36 volts.

In that Bluetooth app, tapping 0 turns the motor off, while pressing 1 causes the motor 1 to spin right. Similar to this, when tapping 2 , 3 and 4, the motors 1 turns left , the motor 2 turn right and the motor 2 spins left, respectively.

Code 

int motorPin1 = 3;
int motorPin2 = 4;
int motorPin3 = 5;
int motorPin4 = 6;
int state;
int flag;
void setup() { Serial.begin(9600); pinMode(3, OUTPUT); pinMode(4, OUTPUT); pinMode(5, OUTPUT); pinMode(6, OUTPUT);
} void loop() { if (Serial.available() > 0) { state = Serial.read(); flag = 0; } if (state == '0') { digitalWrite(3, LOW); digitalWrite(4, LOW); digitalWrite(5, LOW); digitalWrite(6, LOW ); if (flag = 0) { Serial.println("MOTOR:off"); flag = 1; } } else if (state == '1') { digitalWrite(3, LOW); digitalWrite(4, HIGH); if (flag == 0) { Serial.println("MOTOR1:right"); flag = 1; } } else if (state == '2') { digitalWrite(3, HIGH); digitalWrite(4, LOW ); if (flag == 0) { Serial.println("MOTOR1:left"); flag = 1; } } else if (state == '3') { digitalWrite(5, LOW); digitalWrite(6, HIGH); if (flag == 0) { Serial.println("MOTOR2:right"); flag = 1; } } else if (state == '4') { digitalWrite(5, HIGH); digitalWrite(6, LOW ); if (flag == 0) { Serial.println("MOTOR2:LEFT"); flag = 1; } }
}

Tikam Singh Alma - Jul 23

Once suspended, ndrohith will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, ndrohith will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by ndrohith will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If ndrohith is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Unflagging ndrohith will restore default visibility to their posts.

item.title: 7️⃣ 开发者必备的 VSCODE 快捷键 Thread🧵 | 7️⃣ VSCODE Shortcuts for Developers you should know Thread🧵
item.description:
本提尔沙德拉克

发表于将 CLASS attr 添加到 html 标记

div.header 👇 <div class="header"></div>
 form#search.info 👇 <form id="search" class="info"></form>
  • 添加多个 CLASS 和 ID attr
 p.info1.info2.info3#info <p class="info1 info2 info3" id='info'></p>
  1. 带孩子和乘法的元素
  • 将子元素添加到父元素
ul>li 👇 <ul> <li></li> </ul>
  • 添加多个子元素
ul>li*5 👇 <ul> <li></li> <li></li> <li></li> <li></li> <li></li> </ul>
  1. 元素与兄弟
    • 在另一个旁边添加 html 元素
 div+section+p 👇 <div></div> <section></section> <p></p>
 a{Google} 👇 <header> <a href="">Google</a> </header>
 div>(header>ul>li*2>a)+footer>p 👇 <div> <header> <ul> <li><a href=""></a></li> <li><a href=""></a></li> </ul> </header> <footer> <p></p> </footer> </div>
  1. 隐式标签名称
    • 添加具有相同类的多个子元素
 ul>.item👇 <ul> <li class="item"></li> </ul>
 table>.row>.col*3 👇 <table> <tr class="row"> <td class="col"></td> <td class="col"></td> <td class="col"></td> </tr> </table>
  1. 项目编号
  2. 将编号的类名添加到子元素
ul>li.item$*5 <ul> <li class="item1"></li> <li class="item2"></li> <li class="item3"></li> <li class="item4"></li> <li class="item5"></li> </ul>

你还能建议什么其他的 VSCODE 快捷方式？
在下方评论👇👇

一旦暂停，qbentil 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，qbentil 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，qbentil 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 qbentil 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 qbentil 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 qbentil 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Bentil Shadrack

Posted on Aug 7 

div#info 👇
<div id="info"></div>
  • Add a CLASS attr to html tag 
div.header 👇
<div class="header"></div>

form#search.info 👇
<form id="search" class="info"></form>
  • Add multiple CLASS and ID attr 
p.info1.info2.info3#info
<p class="info1 info2 info3" id='info'></p>
  1. ELEMENT WITH CHILD and MULTIPLICATION
  • Add child element to a parent element 
ul>li 👇
<ul>
    <li></li>
</ul>
  • Add multiple child elements 
ul>li*5 👇
<ul>
    <li></li>
    <li></li>
    <li></li>
    <li></li>
    <li></li>
</ul>
  1. ELEMENT with SIBLINGS
    • Add html element next to another 
div+section+p 👇
<div></div>
<section></section>
<p></p>

a{Google} 👇
<header> <a href="">Google</a> </header>

div>(header>ul>li*2>a)+footer>p 👇
<div>
    <header>
        <ul>
            <li><a href=""></a></li>
            <li><a href=""></a></li>
        </ul>
    </header>
    <footer>
        <p></p>
    </footer>
</div>
  1. IMPLICIT TAG NAMES
    • Adding multiple child element with same class 
ul>.item👇
<ul>
    <li class="item"></li>
</ul>

table>.row>.col*3 👇
<table>
    <tr class="row">
        <td class="col"></td>
        <td class="col"></td>
        <td class="col"></td>
    </tr>
</table>
  1. ITEM NUMBERING
  2. Adding numbered class names to child elements 
ul>li.item$*5
<ul>
    <li class="item1"></li>
    <li class="item2"></li>
    <li class="item3"></li>
    <li class="item4"></li>
    <li class="item5"></li>
</ul>

What other VSCODE shortcut can you suggest?
comment below👇👇

Once suspended, qbentil will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, qbentil will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by qbentil will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If qbentil is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.
